_doc: vinatieri quarantine ratchet — known-red suites excluded so the passing set stays a hard gate (pre-push + CI). List may only SHRINK; every entry needs a backlog ticket. 2026-07-13: harrison solo-verified 5 original entries were pool-load flakes and they were UN-quarantined same day; taskControllerUnit + taskPipeline un-quarantined later that day after David ruled 999.1439 (reality-wins) and the pins were reconciled. See .planning/patriots/PLAYBOOK.md § vinatieri. 2026-07-14 (999.1564): the final 3 entries (ai-command, taskRepository.contract, configRepository.contract) all verified GREEN solo x2 in an isolated pool slot — no product-side bug found. List is now empty. 2026-07-15 (999.1981): mcp-getusertimezone-dedup-characterization was briefly quarantined (pre-existing red, unrelated to 999.1626) then UN-quarantined the same rebase cycle once origin/main picked up the real fix (commit 1e30bb6c, 'mock juggler-shared alias path for getUserTimezone spy') — verified green again before push. 2026-07-16 (999.1985): next_start_scheduler_sweep_w2.regression.test.js quarantined — a deliberately-committed RED characterization/spec test (commit 785fc8a5, 2026-07-09) for an UNIMPLEMENTED scheduler feature (juggler-recur-lifecycle-redesign SPEC.md FR-1(b)); its own docstring confirms no sweep mechanism exists in production code. Never added to this ratchet when committed, so it silently red-gated the superrepo CI Gate's changed-service jest step for every juggler-touching push. Needs a ruling (finish FR-1(b) vs delete the spec test) before un-quarantining either way.
